line_description: A row of a magic cube: two large circles containing the numbers 31 and 29, with partial circles visible at the edges suggesting a 3x3 grid layout. Each circle is interconnected by short straight lines to adjacent circles.

vision_glyph.description: Partial arc visible at the top-left corner of the line, indicating the bottom of another circle from the row above.

unmatched_vision_glyphs.description: Large circle outline containing the number 31 in bold sans-serif digit form. Circle has a thin black stroke and is open at the top where it connects to a partial circle above.

Large circle outline containing the number 29 in bold sans-serif digit form. Circle has a thin black stroke and is open at the top where it connects to a partial circle above, and open at the right edge connecting to a partial circle.
Partial arc visible at the top-center of the line, indicating the bottom of another circle from the row above (between the two main circles).
Partial arc visible at the top-right corner of the line, indicating the bottom of another circle from the row above.

graphics.description: Short straight line segments connecting the main circles horizontally near their top arcs (between the two visible circles and from circle to image edges).
Multiple partial circle arcs at the top edge of the line, indicating this row belongs to a larger 3x3 interconnected circle grid (magic cube structure).
